case_title: WANG HUO VS. RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUO, WANG AS TO DEFENDANT RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY ROSSI, MARY DBA ROSSI CLAIM SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSSI, MARY DBA ROSSI CLAIM SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUO, WANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY $2,984.71 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,049.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE - KOY SAECHAO] FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUO, WANG AS TO DEFENDANT RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-18-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [CURRENT HEARING DATE 02/05/24 AT 1:30 PM] FILED BY DEFENDANT RALPHS GROCERY COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WANG HUO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI # 301135. DEFENDANT RALPH'S GROCERTY COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARY ROSSI. THE COURT DISMISSES THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT MARY ROSSI DBA ROSSI CLAIM SERVICES WITH PREJUDICE AS IT IS NOT A PARTY TO THIS ACTION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
